site_activity.title: Site Activity
site_activity.description: Log entry of page visits and interactive clicks on call-to-actions, used for conversion analytics

type.description: The category of traffic recorded (either pageview visit or element click)

timestamp.description: The exact date and time the event was recorded in UTC

userAgent.description: The web browser's user agent string of the visitor

referrer.description: The referring URL page from which the visitor arrived

path.description: The route path and query parameters loaded by the user

screenSize.description: The window dimensions in pixels (e.g. 1920x1080) of the browsing device

language.description: The configured client browser locale sequence (e.g. es-419 or en)

elementId.description: The optional HTML id attribute of the clicked button or key link

elementText.description: The text label content inside the clicked item (truncated if extremely long)

href.description: The target action or payment redirect reference URL from the hyperlink

/site_activity/{document}.description: Secure Firestore storage collection tracking web traffic, restricted for analytics access to the authorized site administrator
